title: CropVision AI
subtitle: Crop Disease Detection Platform
result: The repository supports local multi-service operation, inference integration, protected scan submission, physical image persistence, and per-user scan history.
limitations: Needs broader real-world crop data, clearer model evaluation, user testing, and a public deployment.

title: AIoT Drowsiness Detection System
subtitle: Edge AI for Driver Safety
result: The repository demonstrates local camera operation and a resilient store-and-forward logging path; the full drowsiness pipeline is documented in the CV and design reports.
limitations: No controlled accuracy, latency, memory, lighting, or face-angle evaluation is supplied; not a certified safety product.

title: WSL-DR
subtitle: Weakly Supervised Diabetic Retinopathy Grading
result: The repository records validation QWK 0.6942 and includes a CLI demo for grade prediction and attention visualization.
limitations: Needs stronger reproducibility and external validation. Interpretability maps are not clinical proof; not for diagnosis.
